name: discover_components
description: Semantically discover relevant UI components with automatic default selection

intent.description: User goal to match against component semantics, for example 'pricing section with annual toggle'.

framework.description: Optional framework filter. Omit to search across frameworks.

tags.description: Optional tag filters used to narrow results, for example ['dashboard', 'table'].

status.description: Optional lifecycle filter such as draft or published.

complexity.description: Optional complexity filter such as low, medium, or high.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.
